name: code-writing-rules-expert
description: Project-specific code writing standards, conventions, and best practices for consistent code quality

can_do: Provide code writing standards and conventions
Recommend naming patterns for variables, functions, and classes
cannot_do: Write actual code (delegates to technology experts)
Override language syntax rules (defers to typescript-expert, etc.)

always_consult.statement: This expert should be consulted whenever code is being written, regardless of language or framework
always_consult.notes: Ensures consistent code quality across all generated code

opinion_based.statement: All recommendations from this expert are opinions (confidence < 1.0) and can be adjusted based on project needs

notes.customization: Add your team's specific rules to expert.influencer.json
notes.confidence: Adjust confidence scores based on how strongly you want rules enforced (0.50-0.99)
notes.evolution: Update rules as your team's standards evolve
